cross_market_alignment.availability_statement: All supplied ES observations carried event_ts and available_ts. The locked materialized packs did not supply NQ or RTY value rows for this diagnostics view, so the runtime created no aligned ES/NQ/RTY snapshot and did not infer or forward-fill missing instruments.

rejection_reason_records.message: No diagnostics observations were supplied for required symbols: NQ, RTY
Per-symbol aligned coverage is below the configured cross-market threshold.
Per-symbol missingness exceeds the configured cross-market threshold.
Aligned cross-market snapshots are below the configured descriptive minimum.

family_requirement_coverage.beta_residual: attempted_by_pair_summary; residual proxies null because no aligned ES/NQ/RTY snapshot exists
family_requirement_coverage.confirmation_divergence: attempted_by_pair_summary; divergence or confirmation cannot be summarized without aligned cross-market legs
family_requirement_coverage.lead_lag: attempted_by_runtime; rejected because no aligned ES/NQ/RTY snapshot exists
family_requirement_coverage.rotation: attempted_by_pair_and_regime_summary; regime summaries empty because no aligned ES/NQ/RTY snapshot exists

dataset_version_lock.coverage_report_hash_status: P03 registry record did not expose coverage_report_hash; symbol-level row coverage remains a downstream diagnostic audit item.

feature_pack_locks.value_store_format: dual; research-scale consumers must use the Parquet side of the P03 lock.

limitations: Cross-market diagnostics are descriptive Tier 0 summaries; a complete diagnostic is not alpha validation.
The report stores scalar summaries only and does not embed market observations or feature and label payloads.
Correlation summaries are delegated to alpha_system.research.correlation.
Lead/lag summaries compare prior synchronized snapshots to current synchronized snapshots under available_ts discipline.
Spread and residual proxies are arithmetic descriptors only; no hedge model, strategy, or portfolio object is created.
Regime-conditioned correlation is limited because no descriptive regime labels were supplied.
Factor diagnostics are descriptive Tier 0 summaries; a diagnostic PASS is not alpha validation.
The report stores scalar summaries only and does not embed feature or label observations.
IC, RankIC, decay, and bucket summaries are delegated to alpha_system.research.ic and alpha_system.research.buckets.
Descriptive label diagnostics only; quality gates are not promotion decisions.
The runtime summarizes supplied diagnostics and references; it does not materialize labels.
Coverage and leakage results depend on upstream registered label audits and input resolution.
Cost stress is a descriptive sensitivity summary, not realized execution output.
Slippage is labeled as a proxy and is not a realized fill measurement.
The double_cost profile is required, but passing it is not a promotion decision.
BBO spread crossing is used only when supplied BBO context is present; no spread is fabricated.
BBO context was unavailable or unused, so the bps fallback marker is visible.

rejection_reasons.message: No diagnostics observations were supplied for required symbols: NQ, RTY
Per-symbol aligned coverage is below the configured cross-market threshold.
Per-symbol missingness exceeds the configured cross-market threshold.
Aligned cross-market snapshots are below the configured descriptive minimum.
Label audit reports are required for label diagnostics.
Label diagnostics require declared cost-adjustment metadata.
Cost stress input count is below the configured descriptive minimum.
Primary threshold expectancy proxy is non-positive under double_cost.
No declared threshold stayed positive under the double_cost proxy.

quality_gates.name: Cost stress sample gate
quality_gates.summary: Cost stress input count is visible against the configured minimum.

quality_gates.name: Double cost profile gate
quality_gates.summary: The required double_cost profile is present in the cost-stress summary.

limitations: A favorable gate is not a promotion decision.
quality_gates.name: Cost fragility gate
quality_gates.summary: Double-cost sensitivity is compared with the configured descriptive threshold.

quality_gates.name: Slippage proxy gate
quality_gates.summary: Slippage is explicitly labeled as a proxy in the cost model version.

rejection_reason_records.message: Cost stress input count is below the configured descriptive minimum.

limitations: Factor diagnostics are descriptive Tier 0 summaries; a diagnostic PASS is not alpha validation.
The report stores scalar summaries only and does not embed feature or label observations.
IC, RankIC, decay, and bucket summaries are delegated to alpha_system.research.ic and alpha_system.research.buckets.
Full no-lookahead audit remains scoped to a later runtime phase.
quality_gates.name: Availability gate
quality_gates.summary: Feature available_ts and label_available_ts presence is summarized.

quality_gates.name: Coverage gate
quality_gates.summary: Usable factor and label pair coverage is summarized.

quality_gates.name: Sample gate
quality_gates.summary: Usable sample size is summarized for descriptive diagnostics.

quality_gates.name: Outlier gate
quality_gates.summary: Factor outlier rate is summarized against the configured threshold.

quality_gates.name: IC gate
quality_gates.summary: IC and RankIC scalar summaries are delegated to research.ic.

quality_gates.name: Bucket gate
quality_gates.summary: Bucket return monotonicity summary is delegated to research.buckets.

limitations: Decay slope requires at least two populated horizons.
quality_gates.name: Decay gate
quality_gates.summary: Decay curve scalar summary is delegated to research.ic.

rejection_reason_records.message: Label audit reports are required for label diagnostics.
Label diagnostics require declared cost-adjustment metadata.

limitations: Signal Probe is a Tier 1 descriptive screen, not strategy validation.
Position changes use next-bar or explicit delayed fills; same-bar fills are forbidden.
Cost-aware expectancy is a proxy built from runtime.cost stress summaries.
Slippage remains labeled as a proxy through the attached CostSensitivityReport.
A complete probe is not a candidate, promotion decision, or profitability claim.

rejection_reason_records.message: Primary threshold expectancy proxy is non-positive under double_cost.
No declared threshold stayed positive under the double_cost proxy.

zero_cost_profile_boundary.reason: FUTCORE-P04 treats zero_cost as diagnostic-only contrast; this phase's runtime cost-stress report covers required non-zero profiles base, stress_1, stress_2, and double_cost.

pending_p15_gap_refs.deferred_binding: Cross-market derived-state FeaturePack binding for beta residual, basket residual, relative-rank or catch-up, pair divergence, and agreement state

study_spec.source_alpha_spec_summary: NQ beta residual versus an ES and RTY basket using only completed, aligned cross-market inputs.
